description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Template for Custom Board Build that accepts a string input args. The workflow runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs Python 3.11, and then installs PlatformIO build dependencies. It performs a pre-build step to ensure the PlatformIO boards folder is created, copies a custom board JSON file to the boards folder, and then builds the project using the provided args. If the build fails, it uploads the build artifacts and exits with a non-zero status.
